title: Apostle to you
description: Make Apostle's clothing in phase 2 looks flamed!
body:
# ❤️‍🔥Description
This simple pack makes the Apostle BOSS from [Goety Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/goety) 's clothing looks **flamed** in phase 2!

Asked by [Player_7](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2Sob5XVVPIFNFFErP-wnbg)

~~When I asked what should be the project name, he said "Up to you", so we got this name.~~

---

<center>
